Policy Activation.description: does it catch the hidden or blocking rule that actually controls the case?

Policy Interpretation.description: does it understand what the rule means?

Evidence Grounding.description: does it anchor to the right clause/evidence?

Procedural Compliance.description: does it follow required steps in order?

Authorization & Access Control.description: does it check who is allowed?

Temporal / State Reasoning.description: does it handle time, history, state?

Escalation / Abstention.description: does it know when not to decide?
